default: MaxLogic Kokoro voice preview. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog while a calm narrator describes the weather, the traffic, and a late afternoon train arriving exactly on time.
en: MaxLogic Kokoro voice preview. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog while a calm narrator describes the weather, the traffic, and a late afternoon train arriving exactly on time.
en-us: MaxLogic Kokoro voice preview. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog while a calm narrator describes the weather, the traffic, and a late afternoon train arriving exactly on time.
en-gb: MaxLogic Kokoro voice preview. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog while a calm narrator describes the weather, the traffic, and an evening train arriving exactly on time.
es: Vista previa de voz de MaxLogic Kokoro. Esta muestra tiene frases cortas y largas para comprobar la claridad, el ritmo natural y la manera en que la voz mantiene una entonacion estable al leer una noticia breve.
fr: Apercu vocal MaxLogic Kokoro. Cet extrait melange des phrases courtes et plus longues pour verifier la clarte, le rythme naturel et la facon dont la voix garde une intonation stable pendant une lecture continue.
fr-fr: Apercu vocal MaxLogic Kokoro. Cet extrait melange des phrases courtes et plus longues pour verifier la clarte, le rythme naturel et la facon dont la voix garde une intonation stable pendant une lecture continue.
hi: MaxLogic Kokoro awaaz namuna. Yah chhota sa ansh spashtata, gati, aur lambi vaakya rachna me swabhavik dhvani ko parakhne ke liye taiyar kiya gaya hai, taki aap awaaz ki gunvatta ko dhyan se sun saken.
